text:
Comment on attachment 187404
Part 2 - Add WAYLAND option

Hmm, if graphics/mesa-libs is built with WAYLAND=off the following happens:

checking for wayland-client >= 1.11... no
configure: error: Package requirements (wayland-client >= 1.11) were not met:

Package 'wayland-client', required by 'virtual:world', not found
